page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for compute-intensive workloads. It features an Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 48 dedicated physical cores operating at 2.9 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 310.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 6.46 GB of RAM per core. For hardware acceleration, it includes a single NVIDIA A10 GPU based on the Ampere architecture, offering 24 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, requiring external storage solutions, while network connectivity is supported by a 16 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark evaluations indicate strong performance in multi-threaded decompression and cryptographic operations. The server achieved a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression rate of 230.87 GB/sec and a Passmark CPU encryption score of 42228.64, both placing in the top 25% tier. In contrast, standard single-core and multi-core CPU benchmarks, such as stress-ng and Geekbench, align with average tier performance. The onboard NVIDIA A10 GPU demonstrates top-tier efficiency for small to medium language model inference, processing 9711.08 tokens per second for a 135M model prompt and 2509.43 tokens per second for a 7B model prompt. However, no benchmark data is available for larger 70B models, representing a potential limitation for larger-scale AI workloads.

From a resource density and cost-efficiency perspective, the instance offers a balanced allocation of dedicated physical cores and system memory alongside a mid-range enterprise GPU. The lack of hyperthreading (1.0 thread per core) ensures predictable execution times for dedicated compute tasks, though it limits concurrent thread density compared to hyperthreaded alternatives. This hardware profile is optimized for workloads such as medium-scale LLM inference, image processing, multi-threaded data decompression, and cryptographic processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 48 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz. It is equipped with 310.0 GB of RAM and a single NVIDIA A10 GPU with 24 GB of VRAM, while local storage is absent. The instance delivers top-tier performance in LLM inference for small and medium models, alongside strong multi-threaded decompression and cryptographic capabilities. However, standard CPU benchmarks remain in the average tier, and the lack of hyperthreading limits concurrent thread density. This server is optimized for medium-scale AI inference, image processing, and cryptographic workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 48 Intel Xeon cores, 310 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A10 GPU, optimized for medium-scale LLM inference and cryptographic tasks.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge features 48 Intel Xeon cores, 310 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A10 GPU for accelerated AI inference and compute workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated platform featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and NVIDIA Ampere architecture for efficient medium-scale AI inference and cryptographic processing.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores operating at 2.9 GHz
1x NVIDIA A10 GPU with 24 GB VRAM for hardware acceleration
310.0 GB of system memory with 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier LLM inference speeds for small and medium-sized models
Strong multi-threaded decompression and cryptographic benchmark performance
Zero local storage, requiring external storage configurations
